# niko-cli

> Developer ops toolkit by DaciaSec

## Features

- 🤖 **AI Commit Analysis** - Smart git commits with AI-powered suggestions
- 🐚 **Auto Shell Detection** - Works with bash or zsh automatically
- 🔑 **AI API Key Management** - Configure OpenAI, Claude, Moonshot, Gemini, Groq
- 📝 **Customizable Git Style** - Conventional, Angular, or custom commit formats
- 🔧 **Shell Config Management** - Edit bashrc/zshrc, manage aliases and env vars
- 🩺 **System Doctor** - Health checks for your dev environment

## Install

```bash
npm install -g @daciasec/niko-cli
```

## Quick Start

```bash
niko              # Run setup wizard
niko commit       # Make a smart git commit
niko bashrc       # Edit shell config
niko doctor       # Check system health
```
